testcase.name: TenancyController API error matrix > GET /tenants > returns 200 with tenant summaries
TenancyController API error matrix > GET /tenants > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants > returns 201 after provisioning a tenant
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants > returns 400 for malformed JSON
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > GET /tenants/:id > returns 200 with tenant detail
TenancyController API error matrix > GET /tenants/:id > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > GET /tenants/:id > returns 404 for an unknown tenant id
TenancyController API error matrix > PATCH /tenants/:id > returns 200 after updating tenant metadata and settings
TenancyController API error matrix > PATCH /tenants/:id > returns 400 for malformed JSON
TenancyController API error matrix > PATCH /tenants/:id > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > PATCH /tenants/:id > returns 404 for an unknown tenant id
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/suspend > returns 201 after suspending a tenant
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/suspend > returns 400 for malformed JSON
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/suspend > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/suspend > returns 404 for an unknown tenant id
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/archive > returns 201 after archiving a tenant
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/archive > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/archive > returns 404 for an unknown tenant id
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/purge > returns 201 after purging a tenant
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/purge > returns 403 when the platform admin guard is disabled
TenancyController API error matrix > POST /tenants/:id/purge > returns 404 for an unknown tenant id
StynxTenancyModule integration > resolves tenant from header, bearer claim, and subdomain
StynxTenancyModule integration > rejects missing or invalid tenant context and wrong tenant access
StynxTenancyModule integration > provisions tenants idempotently under concurrent retries
StynxTenancyModule integration > suspends a tenant and blocks subsequent access
